summary: CORS fix verified: Backend correctly returns explicit origins (not wildcard *) with credentials. All features working: login, auth/me, brands listing, Settings tabs (Marcas, Equipe, Integrações).
passed_tests: Backend: CORS preflight returns explicit origin 'https://labrand.com.br' (not wildcard *)
Backend: CORS preflight returns explicit origin for preview URL
Backend: CORS allows required methods (POST, GET, PUT, DELETE)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token and user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
Backend: GET /api/brands returns array with brands (Marca Demo, Sandro Serzedello)
Backend: Login response includes CORS headers
Frontend: Login with admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026! redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Brand name 'Marca Demo' appears in header after login
Frontend: Settings > Marcas tab shows brands list (NOT 'Nenhuma marca cadastrada')
Frontend: Settings > Equipe tab shows team management with 'Teste Demo' member
Frontend: Settings > Integrações tab shows Google integration options (Analytics, Search Console, Drive)
critical_code_review_comments: server_new.py (lines 127-167): CORS fix correctly implemented - reads CORS_ORIGINS and FRONTEND_URL from env vars, builds explicit allowed_origins list, uses DynamicCORSMiddleware as fallback
AuthContext.js: Uses withCredentials: true on all axios calls - compatible with explicit CORS origins
BrandContext.js: Uses withCredentials: true and auto-fetches brands when user+token available
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and brands

cors_fix_verification.issue: CORS misconfiguration - allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec
cors_fix_verification.fix: Replaced wildcard with explicit origins list from CORS_ORIGINS and FRONTEND_URL env vars
cors_fix_verification.verification: VERIFIED - CORS preflight returns 'access-control-allow-origin: https://labrand.com.br' (not *) and 'access-control-allow-credentials: true'

context_for_next_testing_agent: CORS fix verified working. Backend returns explicit origins (not wildcard *) when credentials are allowed. All Settings tabs (Marcas, Equipe, Integrações) load correctly. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cors_fix.py covers CORS headers and auth endpoints. Admin credentials: admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026!
